Variable.Name: Pre_SapGui71
Variable.Value: bFulFilled = vbTrue NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Checking for older SAP GUI Versions..." If NwEngine.Shell.RegKeyExist("HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAP Shared") Then szRegValue = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue("HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAP Shared\SAPdestdir") NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: SapDestDir = " & szRegValue szSapGuiExe = szRegValue & "\SapGui\sapgui.exe" If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( szSapGuiExe ) Then szVersion = NwEngine.Shell.GetFileVersion( szSapGuiExe ) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Existing SAP GUI File-Version is " & szVersion szRelease = Mid( szVersion, 1, Instr( szVersion, "." ) - 1 ) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: Existing SAP GUI Release is " & szRelease If Int( szRelease ) < 7100 Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Variable-Script-Action: This older version of SAP GUI needs to be uninstalled first." bFulFilled = vbFalse End If End If End If If Not bFulFilled Then NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "Pre_SapGui71", "UNDEFINED" End If

Variable.Name: SapGuiPatchLevel
Variable.Value:
strGuiPatch = "0" NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Reading PatchLevel and Hotfix versions..." strSapGuiSetupXML = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%SapSrcDir%\Setup\SapGuiSetup.xml") If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist(strSapGuiSetupXML) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Reading file '" & strSapGuiSetupXML & "'." Dim objXMLDoc Set objXMLDoc = CreateObject("Microsoft.XMLDOM") objXMLDoc.async = False objXMLDoc.load(strSapGuiSetupXML) If objXMLDoc.parseError.errorCode <> 0 Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Error reading file '" & strSapGuiSetupXML & "'! ExitCode: " & objXMLDoc.parseError.errorCode Else Dim Node Set Node = objXMLDoc.SelectSingleNode("//SapSetupProduct")
strPatchHotfix = Node.getAttribute("PatchLevel") If strPatchHotfix <> "" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: PatchLevel is set to: " & strPatchHotfix strGuiPatch = strPatchHotfix NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapGuiPatchLevel", strGuiPatch Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: PatchLevel attribute is not set." End If End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: File '" & strSapGuiSetupXML & "' doesn't exist!" End If
If strGuiPatch = "0" Then strSapFrontDLL = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%SapSrcDir%\SapGui\sapfront.dll") NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Reading PatchLevel from '" & strSapFrontDLL & "'." If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist(strSapFrontDLL) Then strFileVersion = NwEngine.Shell.GetFileVersion(strSapFrontDLL) NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: FileVersion of '" & strSapFrontDLL & "' is set to: " & strFileVersion Dim versionArray versionArray = Split(strFileVersion, ".") If versionArray(1) = "0" Then strGuiPatch = "Beta" Else strGuiPatch = versionArray(2) End If NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: SAP GUI PatchLevel is set to: " & strGuiPatch NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapGuiPatchLevel", strGuiPatch Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: File '" & strSapFrontDLL & "' doesn't exist!" End If End If

Variable.Name: SapFrontEndDirCorrection
Variable.Value:
Option Explicit Dim strSapGuiDestDir strSapGuiDestDir = "HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAP Shared\SAPDestDir"
NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Checking if registry value " & strSapGuiDestDir & " exists." If NwEngine.Shell.RegValueExist(strSapGuiDestDir) Then Dim strSapGuiDestDirValue strSapGuiDestDirValue = NwEngine.Shell.GetRegValue(strSapGuiDestDir) If strSapGuiDestDirValue <> "" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Registry value " & strSapGuiDestDir & " is set to " & strSapGuiDestDirValue & "." Dim strWkstaSapGuiDestDirValue strWkstaSapGuiDestDirValue = NwEngine.Variables.GetValue("SapFrontEndDir") NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Wksta value is set to " & strWkstaSapGuiDestDirValue & "." If strSapGuiDestDirValue <> strWkstaSapGuiDestDirValue Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Wksta value and registry value are different, the registry value will be used." NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapFrontEndDir", strSapGuiDestDirValue Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Wksta value and registry value have the same value, everything is ok." End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Registry value " & strSapGuiDestDir & " exists, but has no value, everything ok." End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "SAP GUI Script: Registry value " & strSapGuiDestDir & " doesn't exist, everything is ok." End If
